title: Instructors for Leadership and/or Social and Emotional Learning (SEL) and/or Learning for Life Programme (LLP) for school students
description:
Instructors for Social and Emotional Learning (SEL) and Learning for Life Programme (LLP) for school students




Apply: hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg


Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. We MUST receive an email application from you in order to consider you.




Instructors must be able to do the following:


1. Draw out Social and Emotional Learning (SEL) competencies in the participants, especially


- Self-Management,


- Relationship (peers, teachers and parents/guardian) and


- Responsible Decision Making skills.


2. Empower participants to improve their resilience and cooperate with others towards a common objective.


3. Create an enviornment enhancing experience and learning opportunities of the participants towards the school’s Learning for Life Programme (LLP) values and develop social emotional competencies, self-efficacies, leadership and competencies, such as:


Preparing participants for future roles in society.


To counter bad influences in society.


Moral values such as:


Honesty.


Hard work.


Respect for others.


Cooperation.


Compassion.


Forgiveness.




Available Assignments for you!


Join us for the greatest sports experience in Singapore! See our website and social media pages!


http://ministryofsports.com.sg/


https://www.facebook.com/mos.com.sg/


https://www.instagram.com/ministryofsports.stars/




You should possess the respective qualifications in international, regional or local associations of your respective sports.


Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter by email.




Interested applicants MUST apply by resume and cover letter through emailing hiring@ministryoffootball.com.sg. We MUST receive an email application from you in order to consider you.
